chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4492 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.18508/2021 2.For hearing of main case. 02.05.2025 Mr.Kumail Abbas, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Ali Nawaz Khuhawar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. This petition is pending since 2021 and order sheet demonstrates that at the very outset and on the first date no notice was issued ostensibly on account of maintainability of petition, hence, learned counsel for the petitioner was given time to consult his client. Learned A.A.G. states that this petition is essentially impugns a show cause notice and the same is not sustainable in view of the judgment in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue v. Jahangir Khan Tareen reported as 2022 SCMR 92, as approved by the Supreme Court subsequently in Judgment dated 15.09.2022 rendered in DCIR vs. Digicom Trading (CA 2019 of 2016). Be that as it may, even four years later brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of petitioner’s counsel. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge nasir
